name: crypto-tracker-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Track cryptocurrency prices, compare assets, and manage portfolios. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: track_price
tools.description: Get the current price, 24h change, and market cap for a cryptocurrency symbol (e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL).

tools.name: compare_cryptos
tools.description: Compare multiple cryptocurrencies side by side. Provide comma-separated symbols (e.g. 'BTC,ETH,SOL').

tools.name: calculate_portfolio
tools.description: Calculate total portfolio value from holdings. Provide as 'BTC:0.5,ETH:10,SOL:100' format.

tools.name: get_market_cap
tools.description: Get the top cryptocurrencies ranked by market capitalisation. Returns up to top_n results (default 5).
